  as={"h1"}

  children={"Update capability preferences"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/capability-preferences"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Update capability preferences for the current team

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"bm25_search_enabled":{"description":"BM25SearchEnabled controls BM25 search (requires text indexing)","type":"boolean"},"embedding_indexing_enabled":{"description":"EmbeddingIndexingEnabled controls vector/embedding indexing","type":"boolean"},"text_indexing_enabled":{"description":"TextIndexingEnabled controls BM25 text indexing","type":"boolean"},"vector_search_enabled":{"description":"VectorSearchEnabled controls vector search (requires embedding indexing)","type":"boolean"}},"type":"object"}}},"description":"Capability preferences","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"bm25_search_enabled":{"description":"Search preferences (can toggle down, but requires indexing to be enabled)","type":"boolean"},"embedding_indexing_enabled":{"description":"Enable vector indexing","type":"boolean"},"team_id":{"description":"TeamID is the team these preferences belong to","type":"string"},"text_indexing_enabled":{"description":"Indexing preferences (explicitly controlled by user)","type":"boolean"},"updated_at":{"description":"UpdatedAt tracks when preferences were last modified","type":"string"},"vector_search_enabled":{"description":"Enable vector search (if embedding indexing enabled)","type":"boolean"}},"type":"object"}}}},"400":{"description":"Invalid request body","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"500":{"description":"Internal server error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
